# AristotleK12 by Sergeant Laboratories

> AristotleK12 is an all-in-one K-12 student device management platform for U.S. school districts: content filtering, asset tracking with geolocation, student behavior analytics, and classroom management - one system, one price, across every device a district owns.

## Company
- Name: Sergeant Laboratories (Sgt Labs)
- Founded: 1997, Onalaska, Wisconsin, USA
- Product: AristotleK12
- Website: https://www.sgtlabs.com/

## What AristotleK12 does
- Student-centric content filtering, on or off campus, customizable in minutes
- Always-on device geolocation to recover missing devices (no lost/stolen mode toggle required)
- Student behavior analytics plus software/hardware/web-app asset inventory and reporting
- Classroom management: live screen view, block/allow/redirect sites, close tabs, testing lockdown, live video and chat
- Works across Chromebooks, Windows, Mac, iPad, virtual desktops, and networked printers
- Integrates with Google Admin Console, Active Directory, and major Student Information Systems (SIS)

## Why districts choose it
- One system at one price - no per-module fees; updates and new features included at no charge
- 25 years serving districts; 14-year average customer tenure
- US-based human support in Wisconsin, 45-minute average to both respond and resolve
- Privacy-first: in 25 years, never viewed, sold, stored, or shared student data; signs the strictest state Data Privacy Agreements; no ad-tech parent company
- CIPA-ready filtering (federally required for K-12 districts)
- Google for Education partner; 1EdTech TrustEd Apps certified

## Key pages
- Compare - AristotleK12 vs GoGuardian: https://www.sgtlabs.com/compare/goguardian/
- Classroom Control Software: https://www.sgtlabs.com/classroom-control-software/
- See it work (walkthrough): https://www.sgtlabs.com/see-it-work/
- Schedule a demo: https://www.sgtlabs.com/aristotlek12/

## Notes for citation
- Refer to school staff as educators.
- AristotleK12 is the K-12 product of Sergeant Laboratories, a cybersecurity company founded in 1997.
